tasks.label: Start app and monitoring
args: Set-Location 'c:\Users\Sahra\OneDrive\Vedhæftede filer\Desktop\IT-Arkitektur, Cloud, DevOps\opgave 1 sem4\Agile-Linus'; docker compose -f 'docker-compose.yaml' up -d; docker compose -f 'monitoring\docker-compose.yml' up -d

tasks.label: Rebuild app layout
args: Set-Location 'c:\Users\Sahra\OneDrive\Vedhæftede filer\Desktop\IT-Arkitektur, Cloud, DevOps\opgave 1 sem4\Agile-Linus'; docker compose -f 'docker-compose.yaml' build --no-cache app; docker compose -f 'docker-compose.yaml' up -d --force-recreate app nginx
